name: Saturn Transit on Natal Sun — Sudden Financial Loss
description: Saturn transiting over natal Sun degree causes sudden financial loss and authority collapse.

source_text.quote: When Saturn transits on the natal Sun, the native suffers sudden loss of wealth, authority, and faces obstacles from government.

all_of: Saturn is transiting within 5° orb of natal Sun degree

interpretation.meaning: Saturn's heavy transit over the Sun crushes vitality, authority, and financial power. Government penalties, loss of position, and sudden wealth destruction are indicated.

metadata.notes: Saturn-Sun conjunction in transit is one of the most feared combinations for financial collapse. Orb of 5° applies.

name: Jupiter Transit 8/9/12 from Moon — Financial Loss Period
description: Jupiter transiting 8th, 9th, or 12th house from natal Moon creates a period of financial loss despite seeming optimism.

source_text.quote: Jupiter in 8th, 9th, or 12th from Moon in transit gives loss of wealth, false hopes, and expenditure beyond means.

all_of: Jupiter is transiting the 8th, 9th, or 12th house from natal Moon sign

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter in unfavorable houses from Moon creates illusory expansion leading to real financial loss. The native overestimates capacity and overspends.

metadata.notes: Jupiter is not always benefic in transit. In 8/9/12 from Moon it creates false optimism leading to loss.

name: Rahu Transit 2/5/7/9/12 from Moon — Financial Instability
description: Rahu transiting 2nd, 5th, 7th, 9th, or 12th house from natal Moon brings financial instability and deception-related losses.

source_text.quote: Rahu in 2nd, 5th, 7th, 9th, or 12th from Moon causes financial loss through deception, speculation failure, and partner betrayal.

all_of: Rahu is transiting the 2nd, 5th, 7th, 9th, or 12th house from natal Moon sign

interpretation.meaning: Rahu in adverse houses from Moon creates financial chaos through deception, failed speculation, and unexpected betrayals in financial partnerships.

metadata.notes: Rahu's shadowy nature amplifies deception and illusion in financial matters when transiting adverse houses from Moon.

name: Saturn/Rahu/Ketu in 9-11th Nakshatra from Janma — Financial Destruction
description: Saturn, Rahu, or Ketu transiting through the 9th to 11th nakshatra from Janma Nakshatra (Left Leg nakshatras in SBC) triggers financial destruction.

source_text.quote: When Saturn, Rahu, or Ketu transit the 9th to 11th nakshatras from Janma Nakshatra (left leg position in SBC), severe financial destruction manifests.

all_of: Saturn, Rahu, or Ketu is transiting the 9th, 10th, or 11th nakshatra counted from Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: The left leg nakshatras (9-11 from Janma) represent the foundation of material support. Slow malefics here destroy financial stability systematically.

metadata.notes: SBC left-leg nakshatras are critical vulnerability points. Slow malefics here indicate prolonged financial destruction phase.
